firstRun.reason: The stability gate detected two workload identities. Inspection showed nondeterministic ordering of equivalent duplicate-output rows; the workload sort was fixed to include stable output ID.

secondRun.reason: The workload identity was stable, but texture uploads, retirement churn, and one global in-flight wait remained active inside the quiet window. Capture did not start.

note: The live capture rejection is the required Phase 5.2.1 behavior. Eliminating the measured steady-state upload, retirement, and wait activity belongs to the following Phase 5.2 implementation steps.
